languages.text: "Держать оборону до прибытия флота династии. Как видите, мы справились".
"To hold the line until the arrival of the dynastic fleet. As you can see, we have succeeded."
languages.original_text: "Держать оборону до прибытия флота династии. Как видите, мы справились".

traits.locale_text: "To hold the line until the arrival of the dynastic fleet. As you can see, we have succeeded."

languages.text: "Bis zur Ankunft der dynastischen Flotte die Stellung zu halten. Und wie Ihr seht, haben wir es geschafft."
languages.original_text: "To hold the line until the arrival of the dynastic fleet. As you can see, we have succeeded."

traits.locale_text: "Bis zur Ankunft der dynastischen Flotte die Stellung zu halten. Und wie Ihr seht, haben wir es geschafft."

languages.text: « Tenir position en attendant l'arrivée de la flotte dynastique. Comme vous pouvez le constater, nous avons accompli notre mission. »
languages.original_text: "To hold the line until the arrival of the dynastic fleet. As you can see, we have succeeded."

traits.locale_text: « Tenir position en attendant l'arrivée de la flotte dynastique. Comme vous pouvez le constater, nous avons accompli notre mission. »

languages.text: «Mantener la posición hasta que llegara la flota de la dinastía. Como puede ver, lo hemos conseguido».
languages.original_text: "To hold the line until the arrival of the dynastic fleet. As you can see, we have succeeded."

traits.locale_text: «Mantener la posición hasta que llegara la flota de la dinastía. Como puede ver, lo hemos conseguido».

languages.text: "Hanedanlık filosu gelene dek hattı savunmak. Gördüğünüz üzere başardık."
languages.original_text: "To hold the line until the arrival of the dynastic fleet. As you can see, we have succeeded."

traits.locale_text: "Hanedanlık filosu gelene dek hattı savunmak. Gördüğünüz üzere başardık."

languages.text: “坚守防线，直到王朝舰队抵达。如您所见，我们做到了。”
languages.original_text: "To hold the line until the arrival of the dynastic fleet. As you can see, we have succeeded."

traits.locale_text: “坚守防线，直到王朝舰队抵达。如您所见，我们做到了。”

languages.text: 「王朝艦隊の到着まで陣地を守りましょう。ご覧のとおり、成功しました。」
languages.original_text: "To hold the line until the arrival of the dynastic fleet. As you can see, we have succeeded."

traits.locale_text: 「王朝艦隊の到着まで陣地を守りましょう。ご覧のとおり、成功しました。」
